subject: Social Sciences
title: Globalisation Game
tagline: Understand trade, global connections and their local effects!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: What is globalisation?
options: Hiring workers in another country to do the work
A company operating in many countries
Growing interconnection between countries and economies
Local businesses can struggle to compete
stages.correctOption: Growing interconnection between countries and economies
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Growing interconnection between countries and economies is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Growing interconnection between countries and economies.

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.question: What technology sped up globalisation?
options: The World Trade Organisation
Growing interconnection between countries and economies
Local businesses can struggle to compete
The internet
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The internet is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The internet.

stages.name: Stage 3
stages.question: What is a benefit of globalisation?
options: Local businesses can struggle to compete
They transport goods around the world
Access to a wider variety of goods and ideas
A company operating in many countries
stages.correctOption: Access to a wider variety of goods and ideas
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Access to a wider variety of goods and ideas is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Access to a wider variety of goods and ideas.

stages.name: Stage 4
stages.question: What is a downside of globalisation?
options: It has shifted many jobs to other countries
Local businesses can struggle to compete
They transport goods around the world
The World Trade Organisation
stages.correctOption: Local businesses can struggle to compete
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Local businesses can struggle to compete is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Local businesses can struggle to compete.

stages.name: Stage 5
stages.question: What is 'cultural globalisation'?
options: The internet
The World Trade Organisation
Local businesses can struggle to compete
The spread of ideas and culture across the world
stages.correctOption: The spread of ideas and culture across the world
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The spread of ideas and culture across the world is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The spread of ideas and culture across the world.

stages.name: Stage 6
stages.question: What organisation regulates international trade?
options: The World Trade Organisation
They transport goods around the world
The spread of ideas and culture across the world
Local businesses can struggle to compete
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The World Trade Organisation is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The World Trade Organisation.

stages.name: Stage 7
stages.question: What is a multinational corporation?
options: A company operating in many countries
Growing interconnection between countries and economies
The World Trade Organisation
Local businesses can struggle to compete
stages.correctOption: A company operating in many countries
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A company operating in many countries is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A company operating in many countries.

stages.name: Stage 8
stages.question: How has globalisation affected jobs?
options: The internet
A company operating in many countries
It has shifted many jobs to other countries
The spread of ideas and culture across the world
stages.correctOption: It has shifted many jobs to other countries
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! It has shifted many jobs to other countries is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is It has shifted many jobs to other countries.

stages.name: Stage 9
stages.question: What is 'outsourcing'?
options: The World Trade Organisation
Access to a wider variety of goods and ideas
The spread of ideas and culture across the world
Hiring workers in another country to do the work
stages.correctOption: Hiring workers in another country to do the work
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Hiring workers in another country to do the work is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Hiring workers in another country to do the work.

stages.name: Stage 10
stages.question: What role do container ships play in globalisation?
options: It has shifted many jobs to other countries
They transport goods around the world
Local businesses can struggle to compete
The internet
stages.correctOption: They transport goods around the world
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! They transport goods around the world is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is They transport goods around the world.
